titleStmt.title: SII 23.489: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 489. (A.R. No. 489 of 1907.) Kuttālam, Mayuram Taluk, Tanjavur District Uttaravēdīśvara temple—on the north wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine Vikrama-Chōḷa: year 6: 1123-24 A.D.

summary.p: The inscription states that the introduction is taken as beginning with the words Pūmādu puṇara etc. The details of date are given as Siṁha, ba.*., Thursday, Śadayam (=A.D. 1123. August 9). The tithi was ba. 1. This registers the sale of a quarter vēli and odd of land tax free for 10 kāśu (inclusive of 7(1/2) kāśu towards the taxes) by the assembly of Uttamaśōḻa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam a brahmadēya in Tiruvaḻundūr-nāḍu which is here stated to be a division of Rājanārāyaṇa-vaḷanāḍu, to a certain Eṟichchēri-uḍaiyāṉ Rājaśikhāmaṇi-Viḻupparaiyaṉ of Ādaṉūr for his making it over to the temple of Śoṉṉavāṟaṟivār at Vīṅgunīr-Tirutturutti as Śemmaṇḍaippuṟam (?) The names of ten members of the sabhā are given as party for the sale and they are said to have met in the temple of Kailāsamuḍaiyār in their village for the purpose.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūmātu puṇarap puvimātu vaḷara nāmātu viḷaṅka ceya mātu ni
lavat taṉṉirupatu meṉṟu tiruvāykkeḻvi Eḻuti tiripuvaṉac cakkara vattikaḷ
śrī vikkirama coḻatevarkku yāṇṭu Āṟāvatu ciṅkanāyaṟṟu Apara pakkattu
yum viyāḻakkiḻamaiyāṉa cataiyattu nāḷ Irāya nārāyaṇa (rāyaṇa)vaḷanāṭ
ṭut tiruveḻuntūr nāṭṭu brahmateyam Uttamacoḻac caruppeti maṅkalattu makācapai
yom Iṟṟaināḷāl Ivvūruṭaiyār śrīkayilāyamuṭaiyār koyil peruṅkuṟiyāy
kūṭṭaṅkuṟaivaṟa kūṭiiruntu viṅkinirt tirutturutti Uṭaiyār coṉṉavāraṟivār koyil mu
laviruttiyarākiya caṇṭeciratevarkku Iṟaiyiliyākac ceytukuṭutta cemmaṇṭaippu
ṟam ceytu kuṭukkaykku capaiyuḷḷiruntu paṇittār Araṇaippuṟattu Eccakumārapaṭṭarum kārampicceṭṭu ka
ṟutta pocaṉ cikiṣṇappaṭṭarum karippuṟattu Aṉantipaṭṭarum kārampicceṭṭu tiruvaraṅka nārāyaṇapaṭṭarum
kārampicceṭṭu kaṟuttapocaṉ paramāṟmapaṭṭarum kuravaceri Ecca kumārapaṭṭarum kārampicceṭṭu kaṟuttapo
caṉ Iḷaiyacikiṣṇapaṭṭarum kārampicceṭṭu kaṟuttapocaṉ Uyyak koṇṭāṉ paṭṭarum kārampicceṭṭu kaṟutta
pocaṉ neyyuṇṭāṉpaṭṭarum Araṇaippuṟattu Iḷaiya yaccakumāra paṭṭarum Uḷḷiṭṭa makācapaiyār paṇiyāl Inta
Inta Āticaṇṭecuratevarkku cemmaṇṭaippuṟam* ceytukuṭutta nilattukku kiḻpāṟkellai neṉmalaicceri nilattukku meṟkum
teṉpāṟkellai viṟkiṉṟoṉilattukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai toḻuttālaṅkuṭiyil Uṭaiyār coṉṉavāraṟivār tevatāṉam
māṉa nilattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai nelmalaicceri nilattukku teṟkum Āka Icainta perunāṉkellaiyuḷ naṭu
vuppaṭṭa nilam kālearaikkāṇiyum Ātaṉūruṭaiyāṉ Eṟicceri yuṭaiyāṉāṉa Iraāccikāmaṇi viḻupparayaṉu
kku viṟṟukkuṭuttu Innilattukku vilaiyāka Ivaṉ pakkal koṇṭa kācu Iraṇṭaraiyum Innilattukku Iṟaikkuṭalāka
meṟpaṭiyāṉ Iṭakkoṇṭa kācu Eḻaraiyum Āka Iṟaikkum vilaip poruḷukkum Āka Ivaṉ pakkal koṇṭa kācu pa
ttum Inta Ātaṉūruṭaiyāṉāṉa Eṟicceriyuṭaiyāṉ Irācacikāmaṇi viḻupparaiyaṉ Orunāḷāl Oru kiḻiyākak kuṭuttu
Iccoṉṉavāraṟivār koyil mulaviruttiyarākiya Āticaṇṭecira tevaṟku Iṟaiyiliyāka cemmaṇṭaippuṟam
ceytu kuṭuttom Inta Uttamacoḻac caruppetimaṅkalattu makā capaiyom Inta nilattu meṉokkiṉa maramum
kiḻnokkiṉa kiṇaṟum nirurimai paṇpāṭu paḻamāṉār pāyavum vāravum maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭa Urimaikaḷum Akappaṭa nāṅka
ḷe Iṟaiyili ceytukuṭutta nilam kālearaikkāṇiyum nokki Uḷḷa peruvari cilvariyum tiruvācalāl ponta kuṭi
maikaḷum cantirāyittavaṟ I pokkaṟukkakaṭavomāka Innilam cātakamāka Iṟaiyiliye Aṉupavikka peṟukaikku U
ṭaiyār coṉṉavāraṟivār koyilil kallilum cempilum veṭṭik koḷḷappeṟuvatāka cammatittu Iccemmaṇ
ṭaippuṟam kāle Araikkāṇiyum Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭuttom Ittirutturuttic coṉṉavāraṟivā(r)ṟku mulaviruttiya
rākiya Āticaṇṭeciratevaṟku Inta Uttamacoḻac caruppeti maṅkalattu makācapaikkuc camaintu muṟcollappaṭṭa Araṇai
ppuṟattu Eccamurtti cikumārapaṭṭarum kārampicceṭṭu kaṟutta pocaṉ cikiṣṇapaṭṭarum karippuṟattu Aṉṉantippaṭṭarum Uḷḷiṭṭār paṇik
ka Ivarkaḷ paṇiyāl Inta Uttamacoḻac caruppetimaṅkalattu karaṇattāṉ muvalūruṭaiyāṉ tiruppūvaṉamuṭaiyāṉ tirucci
ṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Araṇaippuṟattu Ecca kumārapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku Ivai kārampicceṭṭuk kaṟuttapocaṉ śrīkṛṣṇa
(ṉ)paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai karippuṟattu Aṉnanti
paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai kārampicceṭṭut tiruvaraṅ
kanārāyaṇapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai
kārampiceṭṭuk kaṟuttapocaṉ paramāṟmapaṭṭa
ṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kuravaceri Eññaku
mārappaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kārampi
cceṭṭuk kaṟuttapocaṉ Iḷaiyaśrīkiruṣṇapaṭ
ṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kārampicceṭṭuk
kaṟuttapocan Uyyakkoṇṭāṉpaṭṭaṉ Eḻu
ttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kārampicceṭṭuk kaṟutta
pocaṉ neyyuṇṭāṉpaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippa
ṭikku Ivai Araṇaippuṟattu Iḷaiya Eññakumārapa
ṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 23.489 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
